data.title: The market value of Broccoli, the conceptual meme coin of "CZ Donation Wallet", exceeds 30 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that GMGN market data showed that after CZ publicly disclosed his donation wallet address, he received more than 40 types of Meme coins, among which the market value of Broccoli token exceeded 30 million US dollars and is currently priced at 31.48 million US dollars.

data.title: Rosseti Group Reports Significant Losses Due To Illegal Cryptocurrency Mining
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 18, the Russian power company Rosseti Group disclosed losses exceeding 1.3 billion rubles (approximately $14.2 million) in 2024 due to illegal cryptocurrency mining activities. The North Caucasus region experienced the highest losses, surpassing 600 million rubles, followed by the Novosibirsk region with losses amounting to 400 million rubles.

The company has identified 130 cases of unauthorized access and electricity theft, with the largest incident occurring in Novosibirsk. This case involved 3,200 mining devices and resulted in a loss of 197 million rubles. Currently, more than 40 cases are under investigation according to Russian criminal law.

data.title: Russian power grid Rosseti Group: Illegal cryptocurrency mining caused losses of about $14.2 million last year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Russian power grid company Rosseti Group disclosed that in 2024, illegal cryptocurrency mining caused losses of more than 1.3 billion rubles (about 14.2 million US dollars). Among them, the North Caucasus region suffered the largest losses, exceeding 600 million rubles; the Novosibirsk region lost 400 million rubles. The company has investigated 130 cases of unauthorized access and power theft, the largest of which occurred in Novosibirsk, involving 3,200 mining equipment and causing losses of 197 million rubles. Currently, more than 40 cases are being tried under Russian criminal law. (The Block)

data.title: MKR rose above 1100 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 11.37%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that MKR rose above 1100 USDT and is currently trading at 1127 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 11.37%.

data.title: Grok 3 is now available to all Premium+ subscribers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Grok 3 is now open to all Premium+ subscribers.

data.title: After CZ published his BNB address, the address has received 36 token transfers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, after CZ announced his BNB address, the address has received 36 token transfers, of which five tokens have been marked by Bscscan (including Broccoli ending in 714).

data.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Network OpenZK Receives Early Investment from Animoca
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OpenZK announced that it has received early investment from Animoca and is committed to promoting the expansion and sustainable development of the Ethereum ecosystem. In addition, the OpenZK mainnet and airdrop points activities will start this weekend.
It is reported that OpenZK is a new generation of Ethereum layer 2 network, which uses the ZK architecture as the L2 main body, integrates ETH native staking, re-staking and RWA stablecoin staking functions, and aims to provide users with one-click staking and multiple benefits. Innovative solutions. OpenZK is actively exploring the dual-currency gas fee mechanism, and it is expected to use ETH and native tokens as network gas fees in the future.

data.title: X Increases Premium+ Subscription Price Following AI Model Release
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 18, following the release of the latest AI model Grok 3 by Elon Musk's AI company xAI, X significantly raised the price of its top-tier Premium+ subscription plan. The updated pricing now stands at nearly $50 per month.

The support page for X's premium subscription plans lists the U.S. Premium+ monthly subscription price as $50, with an annual price of $350. This marks the second price increase for the Premium+ plan in recent months. In December 2024, the company raised the subscription fee from $16 to $22 per month.

At the current rates, the new plan costs more than double what Premium+ users were previously paying. Some features of Grok 3 have been placed in a separate SuperGrok plan, accessible through the Grok application.

As a result, only features like "deep search" and "reasoning" will be available to Premium+ plan users. It is noteworthy that X's pricing appears inconsistent: while attempting to register for the Premium+ plan, X displays a monthly fee of $39.83 (or $477.95 annually), but the final checkout page shows an annual fee of $395.

data.title: OKX officially becomes the first global crypto exchange to obtain MiCA license and operate in Europe
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX announced that it has officially become the first global cryptocurrency exchange to obtain a MiCA license and conduct business in Europe. This is an important milestone for OKX and the entire European Economic Area (EEA) crypto industry. Currently, OKX now provides compliant and localized cryptocurrency services to more than 400 million users in 28 countries in the European Economic Area (EEA) through its European headquarters in Malta. Whether users are in France, Germany, Spain, or other member states, they can easily use OKX's cutting-edge crypto products, supporting local payment methods and multiple fiat currency options.
Star posted on the X platform that "OKX is now officially launched in 28 European Economic Area (EEA) countries and complies with MiCA regulations. Compliance and supervision are crucial, and we are committed to providing users with a safe, transparent, and fully compliant trading experience. By supporting euro trading pairs, free bank transfers, and localized services, we make cryptocurrency trading more convenient. In the future, we will continue to optimize our products and services, enhance user experience, and allow every user to easily enjoy the Web3 world."

data.title: A whale deposited another 4 million USDC into Hyperliquid to go long on SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, as the price of SOL fell, a whale continued to deposit 4 million USDC into Hyperliquid to continue to go long on SOL. The whale had previously accumulated a loss of $6.9 million on long positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL (including funding fees).
